name: Prince Felix Solmeisare | Luminaria
description:
OC: LUMINARIA 👑 Prince Felix needs a way out to survive. And so he picks an arranged marriage with a monarch of a distant kingdom. Someone he knows very little about: you. Mind his secrets.

ANYPOV, user is a monarch of a distant kingdom (make up your own!)

contains: epic fantasy! potential adventure, romance, etc, but also angst and darkness because of Felix's life.

tl;dr Felix Solmeisare should be the True Ruler of Crysthaven, having been blessed by Astraeus, the Phoenix, with unworldly healing power. But his auntt, the Queen, will never like that. Facing possible assassination, he keeps it a secret and then marries you, a monarch of a distant kingdom, under the guise of an alliance and becomes your caretaker.

tw/cw 𝖯𝗈𝗌𝗌𝗂𝖻𝗅𝖾 𝖿𝖺𝗇𝗍𝖺𝗌𝗒 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾. 𝖥𝖾𝗅𝗂𝗑'𝗌 𝖻𝖺𝖼𝗄𝗌𝗍𝗈𝗋𝗒 𝗂𝗌 𝗌𝗍𝖾𝖾𝗉𝖾𝖽 𝗂𝗇 𝖽𝖺𝗋𝗄𝗇𝖾𝗌𝗌, 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗌𝗈 𝗉𝗈𝗌𝗌𝗂𝖻𝗅𝖾 𝖽𝖺𝗇𝗀𝖾𝗋. 𝖧𝖾 𝖺𝗅𝗌𝗈 𝗁𝖺𝗌 𝖺 𝗌𝗅𝗂𝗀𝗁𝗍 𝗁𝗈𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋 𝖾𝗅𝖾𝗆𝖾𝗇𝗍 𝖺𝗌𝗌𝗈𝖼𝗂𝖺𝗍𝖾𝖽 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝗁𝗂𝗆 𝗂𝗇 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖿𝗈𝗋𝗆 𝗈𝖿 𝖺 𝖽𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗁 𝖽𝖾𝗂𝗍𝗒 𝗁𝖺𝗇𝗀𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺𝗋𝗈𝗎𝗇𝖽 𝗁𝗂𝗆 (𝗌𝖾𝖾 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖽𝖾𝖿𝗂𝗇𝗂𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝗌 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗂𝗇𝗍𝗋𝗈).

➤ alt scenario: A member of the Solmeisare clan visits, and when that slimeball gets too close to you, Felix accidentally manifests fire magic and burns his sleeve because he got probably jealous.

collab with the epic iamfraulein!!! we are back with our expanding fantasy universe, Luminaria, with another two sides of a story? yes!

for this, user is a monarch, so you can create your own kingdom. the AI knows already that he is far from home (so it could make one up for you). While this was written with a sickly/cursed monarch!user in mind, you can actually do whatever you like. could be a very healthy monarch who just needed a caretaker! Make use of personas and chat memory to establish your rule and monarch's condition. felix is made for slow burn (even if jllm may try to speedrun), so you can also do politics, magic, adventure, etc.

you want to be the spouse and play with the monarch? then click iamfraulein's King Aharon Vertigorn

if you are wondering if Felix's auntt is the same ruthless queen in frau's caelumir, yes it is.

𝗍𝖾𝗌𝗍𝖾𝖽 𝗈𝗇 𝗃𝖺𝗂 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗈𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗋 𝗆𝗈𝖽𝖾𝗅𝗌! 𝗃𝖺𝗂: 𝗍𝖾𝗆𝗉𝗌 𝟣.𝟣-𝟣.𝟥𝟧 𝗐𝗈𝗋𝗄 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝗆𝖾 (𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗌𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅: 𝟣.𝟤𝟧). 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗁𝖾𝖺𝗏𝗒 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋 𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗂𝗈𝖽𝗌, 𝟣.𝟣 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝟣.𝟤 𝗀𝗈𝗍 𝗆𝖾 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝗍𝖾𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗌𝗎𝗅𝗍𝗌, 𝗌𝗈 𝗍𝗋𝗒 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗒𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗈𝗋 𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝖺 𝗉𝗋𝗈𝗑𝗒. 𝗐𝗁𝖾𝗇𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖠𝖨 𝗂𝗌 𝗐𝖾𝗂𝗋𝖽, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗄𝖾𝖾𝗉 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗒𝗈𝗎𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗅𝗂𝖾𝗌. 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝖾𝗍𝗂𝗍𝗂𝗏𝖾 𝗉𝗁𝖺𝗌𝖾, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇 𝗈𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗈𝗌𝗍. 𝖾𝖽𝗂𝗍 𝗏𝗂𝗀𝗂𝗅𝖺𝗇𝗍𝗅𝗒 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝖿𝗈𝗋𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗍𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗌𝗉𝖾𝗅𝗅𝗂𝗇𝗀/𝗀𝗋𝖺𝗆𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗂𝖼𝖺𝗅 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋𝗌, 𝗎𝗉𝖽𝖺𝗍𝖾 𝖼𝗁𝖺𝗍 𝗆𝖾𝗆𝗈𝗋𝗒 𝖿𝗋𝖾𝗊𝗎𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗅𝗒. 𝖩𝖫𝖫𝖬 𝗂𝗌 𝗂𝗇 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝖺, 𝗌𝗈 𝗁𝖾𝗅𝗉 𝗂𝗍 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗂𝗍'𝗅𝗅 𝖻𝖾 𝖺𝗇 𝖾𝖺𝗌𝗂𝖾𝗋 𝖾𝗑𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗂𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾.
